info.description: E-commerce backend for the Rue Cosmetics case study.
info.title: Rue Cosmetics API

post.summary: Log in with email and password
Sign up with email and password

get.summary: Get the caller's cart (mints a guest cart on first call)

post.summary: Add an item to the cart (upserts: qty is summed on conflict)

delete.summary: Remove an item from the cart

post.summary: Merge a guest cart into the user's cart (auth required)
Initialize a Paystack-hosted checkout for the caller's cart

get.summary: Verify a checkout (poll path) — calls Paystack verify and converges with the webhook

get.description: Verifies the service is up and the database is reachable.
